title: Darcy Umbilical
subtitle: Compact vehicle-side umbilical interface for ground power, Ethernet, and abort/safing signals
stackup: Four copper-layer vehicle-side umbilical PCB exported from Altium Gerbers
summary: Vehicle-side umbilical PCB for launch and ground operations, carrying high-voltage/power, Ethernet, ESTOP, and RBF/safing signals through a compact connector boundary with ESD/TVS protection and keyed interfaces to reduce integration error.
mainConstraints: Keep power, Ethernet, ESTOP, and RBF signals auditable across connectors
Use connector orientation and polarity choices to reduce operator error
Add TVS/ESD protection for hardware handled during integration and launch operations
Preserve a compact board outline while meeting vehicle-side mechanical constraints
publicNote: This project is derived from exported Altium schematic and Gerber artifacts. Raw .SchDoc and .PcbDoc files are not parsed by this portfolio.

model3d.title: Darcy Umbilical 3D Model
model3d.description: Interactive 3D board model from the Altium STEP export.

pages.title: Exported Schematic PDF
pages.description: Exported Altium schematic PDF dated 3/18/2026, revision 1.0. The PDF shows the vehicle-side umbilical interface for power, Ethernet, ESTOP, RBF/safing signals, and ESD/TVS protection.
